prompt: There's a typo in our production Nginx config — the proxy_pass URL has a trailing slash that's causing 404s on one endpoint. The fix is removing exactly one character. Show me the surgical edit and a before/after diff.

Our Python service is crashing because of an off-by-one error on line 47 of processor.py. The range should be range(0, len(items)) not range(0, len(items)-1). Make just that one fix with a clear diff.

The CORS header in our Express middleware has 'https' but our staging environment uses 'http'. I need to change exactly one occurrence in server.js — the Access-Control-Allow-Origin for staging — without touching the production CORS config on the line above it.

A feature flag in our config YAML is set to 'false' and needs to be 'true'. The key is 'enable_new_checkout' under the 'features.payments' section. There are 3 other 'enable_' flags nearby — only change this specific one.
Our Dockerfile has 'FROM node:18' but we need to pin it to 'FROM node:18.19.1-alpine'. This is a one-line change in the first line of the Dockerfile. Show the exact edit.
A database connection string in our .env file has the wrong port — it says 5433 but should be 5432. This is a one-character fix. Show me the targeted edit with rollback instructions.
Our CSS has a z-index of 999 on the modal overlay but it needs to be 9999 to appear above the new sticky header. The change is in styles/modal.css line 23. Just the z-index, nothing else.
A regex in our email validation is rejecting valid addresses with plus signs. The pattern is /^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+@/ and needs to be /^[a-zA-Z0-9._+-]+@/. One character addition in the character class.

Our Kubernetes deployment manifest has 'replicas: 2' but we need 'replicas: 3' for the holiday traffic. This is in deploy/production/api.yaml. Simple one-character change. Show the edit and how to revert after the holiday.
The timeout value in our API client is set to 5000ms but downstream service SLAs changed and we need 10000ms. It's in src/clients/payment.ts on the timeout property. Surgical change, nothing else.
